subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Our presence, and We have taken cognizance of its contents. We beseech God that He may unveil unto thee that which thou didst seek [3.5s]... ...Unto Thee be praise, O Lord my God! I entreat Thee, by Thy signs that have encompassed the entire creation
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک بین یدینا و اطلعنا بما فیه نسئل الله بان یکشف لک ما اردته... سبحانک اللّهمّ یا الهی اسئلک بآیاتک الّتی احاطت الممکنات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @living waters; water of life
